samples.xml_description:
Implement a series-parallel conversion circuit. Clock signal. Reset signal (active low). Serial input data. Validity signal for input data. Parallel output data. Validity signal for the output data. Counter to count the number of input data. Counter to count the number of input data. Validity signal for the output data. Parallel output data.

Uses a counter to count the number of input data.

When the counter reaches 8, the parallel output data is output.

 endmodule
